sectionDescriptions.default: Adjust your Vocalype workspace with cleaner controls and clearer defaults.
sectionDescriptions.postprocessing: Turn your dictation into ATS notes, candidate emails, LinkedIn messages, and client summaries.
sectionDescriptions.history: Find, copy and reuse your recent dictations.
sectionDescriptions.meetings: Keep calls, meetings, and voice notes together in one writing workspace.
sectionDescriptions.settings: Keep system behavior and less common options out of the main path.
sectionDescriptions.billing: Manage your plan, limits, and subscription details.
sectionDescriptions.debug: Open diagnostics, local logs, and support tools when Vocalype is misbehaving.

onboarding.title: Get started
onboarding.subtitle: To get started, choose a transcription model

hardware.copilotPlusDescription: This device exposes an NPU class associated with Copilot+ PCs. Vocalype now tracks that capability in its adaptive profile.
hardware.npuDescription: This device exposes a neural processor. Vocalype now includes it in machine detection and diagnostics.

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3.name: Parakeet V3
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3.description: Experimental multilingual ONNX path. Very fast and can work well when you stay in one language, but still less robust than Whisper for mixed-language dictation.

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3-multilingual.name: Parakeet V3
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3-multilingual.description: Fast Parakeet V3 profile with one shared model path. The spoken language is chosen from the app language setting instead of a separate English model.

permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.description: Vocalype needs a couple of permissions to work properly.

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.description: Required to hear your voice for transcription.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: Required to type transcribed text into your applications.

errors.checkFailed: Failed to check permissions. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to request permission. Please try again.

consent.title: Your Privacy
consent.subtitle: Before you start, here is how Vocalype handles your data.
consent.localStorageInfo: Your audio recordings and transcriptions are stored locally on this device. They are never uploaded to any server.
consent.serverSentInfo: A hashed device identifier and your app version are sent to our servers for license validation only. No audio or transcription data is ever transmitted.
consent.exportInfo: You can export or delete all your data at any time from the History settings.
consent.checkboxLabel: I understand and accept how Vocalype handles my data.

mode.fastDescriptionNPU: Minimum latency using this PC's NPU path
mode.balancedDescription: A good balance between speed and quality
mode.qualityDescription: Best text quality on a more powerful machine

firstRun.lastStep: Last step before your first dictation in Vocalype.
firstRun.errorActivateFailed: Model installed but could not be activated. Restart the app.
firstRun.errorActivateAfterDownload: Model downloaded but could not be activated. Restart the app.
firstRun.errorDownloadFailed: Download failed. Check your connection and try again.

modelSelector.geminiCloudWarning: Gemini sends audio to Google for transcription. Other models process everything locally on your device.

modelSettings.title: {{model}} Settings
modelSettings.noSettingsNeeded: This model works automatically with no configuration needed.

longAudioModel.title: Long Audio Model
longAudioModel.description: Automatically switch to a different model when recording duration exceeds the threshold.
longAudioModel.modelDescription: Select a model to use for recordings longer than the threshold.
longAudioModel.thresholdDescription: Switch to the long audio model when recording exceeds this duration.

shortcut.title: Vocalype Shortcuts
shortcut.description: Configure keyboard shortcuts to trigger speech-to-text recording

transcribe.name: Dictation shortcut
transcribe.description: Press to speak and insert text.

cancel.name: Cancel
cancel.description: The keyboard shortcut to cancel the current recording.

pause.name: Pause / Resume
pause.description: The keyboard shortcut to pause or resume the current recording.

transcribe_with_post_process.name: Post-Processing Hotkey
transcribe_with_post_process.description: Optional: A dedicated hotkey that always applies AI post-processing to your transcription.

show_history.name: Show History
show_history.description: Opens the app window and navigates to the History tab.

copy_latest_history.name: Copy Latest
copy_latest_history.description: Copies the latest transcription entry to your clipboard.

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language for speech recognition. Auto will automatically determine the language, while selecting a specific language can improve accuracy for that language.
language.descriptionUnsupported: Parakeet model automatically detects the language. No manual selection is needed.

pushToTalk.label: Push To Talk
pushToTalk.description: Hold to record, release to stop

models.title: Models
models.description: Select a transcription model or download additional models. Quality and speed are relative estimates and can vary a lot depending on hardware, backend, and recording length.

modes.autoDescription: Recommended choice based on this machine and the adaptive profile.
modes.fastDescription: Lowest latency for short dictation and quick capture.
modes.balancedDescription: A steady tradeoff between quality, stability, and speed.
modes.qualityDescription: Prioritizes text quality when the machine can handle it.

models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{modelName}}? You will need to download it again to use it.
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} is your active model. Deleting it will stop transcriptions until you select a new model. Are you sure?

hardware.copilotPlusDescription: Vocalype now keeps that capability in the adaptive profile, but true NPU execution still depends on the model runtime.
hardware.npuDescription: This machine exposes a neural processor. Vocalype now shows it in diagnostics and hardware profiling.

processingModels.title: Processing Models
processingModels.description: Save LLM models for use in post-processing actions.
processingModels.noModels: No processing models saved yet. Add one to use in your actions.

audioFeedback.label: Audio Feedback
audioFeedback.description: Play sound when recording starts and stops

outputDevice.title: Output Device
outputDevice.description: Select your preferred audio output device for feedback sounds

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

startHidden.label: Start Hidden
startHidden.description: Launch to system tray without opening the window.

autostart.label: Launch on Startup
autostart.description: Automatically start Vocalype when you log in to your computer.

startup.label: Launch on Startup
startup.description: Automatically start Vocalype in the background when you log in.

devWorkflow.label: Clean for LLM
devWorkflow.description: Reformat your dictation into a clean prompt via Ollama (local, 100% private).
devWorkflow.activeDescription: Active via Ollama{{model}} — prompt reformatted before paste

errors.checkFailed: Cannot verify Ollama. Please try again.
errors.notInstalled: Ollama is not installed. Install it at ollama.com then try again.
errors.notStarted: Ollama did not start. Check that the installation is complete.
errors.modelNotFound: Model downloaded but not found. Restart the app.

showTrayIcon.label: Show Tray Icon
showTrayIcon.description: Display the Vocalype icon in the system tray.

overlay.title: Overlay Position
overlay.description: Display visual feedback overlay during recording and transcription. On Linux 'None' is recommended.

customWords.title: Custom Words
customWords.description: Add words that are often misheard or misspelled during transcription. The system will automatically correct similar-sounding words to match your list.

appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.description: Runs fully on-device. No API key or network access is required.
appleIntelligence.requirements: Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later. Apple Intelligence must be enabled in System Settings.
appleIntelligence.unavailable: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device. Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later with Apple Intelligence enabled in System Settings.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: API base URL for the selected provider. Only the custom provider can be edited.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

model.title: Model
model.descriptionApple: Provide an optional numeric token limit or keep the default on-device preset.
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the model identifier expected by your custom endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a model exposed by the selected provider.

prompts.title: Prompt

selectedPrompt.title: Selected Prompt
selectedPrompt.description: Select a template for refining transcriptions or create a new one. Use ${output} inside the prompt text to reference the captured transcript.

prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Write the instructions to run after transcription. Example: Improve grammar and clarity for the following text: ${output}
prompts.promptTip: Tip: Use ${output} to insert the transcribed text in your prompt.
prompts.selectToEdit: Select a prompt above to view and edit its details.
prompts.createFirst: Click 'Create New Prompt' above to create your first post-processing prompt.

modelPicker.required: A model is required to run this action.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Press Ctrl + number during dictation to transform your text.
actions.createFirst: Create your first action to process transcriptions with your configured provider.
actions.name: Name
actions.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Format this as a professional email with greeting and sign-off. Add line breaks between paragraphs.
actions.promptTip: Tip: Use ${output} to insert the transcribed text in your prompt.
actions.modelTip: Select a specific model for this action, or use the default from the API section.

templates.title: Ready-to-use actions
templates.readyHint: Actions will use your current post-processing configuration.
templates.setupHint: Add an AI model under Models > Post-processing to run these actions.
templates.description: Quickly install the most useful actions: correction, summary, professional email, or translation.
templates.llmHint: These actions apply after dictation and use the AI model configured in Post-processing. Normal dictation is unchanged.

cleanup.name: Fix
cleanup.description: Cleans up dictation without changing the meaning.
cleanup.prompt: Fix the grammar, punctuation, and clarity of the following text without changing its meaning. Keep the original language. Text: ${output}

summary.name: Summary + actions
summary.description: Turns a long dictation into useful bullet points.
summary.prompt: Summarize the following text in a few clear points, then add an Actions section if tasks are mentioned. Text: ${output}

email.name: Pro email
email.description: Reformats the dictation into a ready-to-send email.
email.prompt: Turn the following text into a professional, clear, and natural email. Add a greeting if needed, structure the paragraphs, and keep the message concise. Text: ${output}

translate.name: Translate to French
translate.prompt: Translate the following text into natural and professional French. Do not add any comments. Text: ${output}

candidateNote.name: Candidate note
candidateNote.description: After a call, creates a clean ATS note.

emailCandidate.name: Candidate email
emailCandidate.description: Turns dictation into a professional follow-up.

linkedinMessage.name: LinkedIn message
linkedinMessage.description: Creates a short sourcing or follow-up message.

clientSummary.name: Client summary
clientSummary.description: Prepares a candidate summary ready to send.

actions.llmExecutionHint: This action does not modify the voice capture. It only transforms the final text with the configured AI model.

history.title: History
history.empty: No transcriptions yet. Start recording to build your history!
history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.
history.transcribeFileSuccess: File transcribed and copied to clipboard.
history.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all recordings and transcriptions.
history.noAiActionsHint: Create an action in Post-processing to correct, summarize, or reformat your past dictations here.
history.actionNeedsPremium: This action requires Premium. Upgrade to Premium to transform history.
history.actionNeedsModel: Configure an AI model in Models > Post-processing to use this action.
history.actionNotFound: This action no longer exists. Check your actions in Post-processing.
history.subtitle: Find, edit, transform, and reuse all your dictations in one place.
history.selectEntry: Select a dictation on the left to view details, audio, and available actions.

gemini.title: Gemini API
gemini.description: Use Google's Gemini API for cloud-based transcription. Requires an API key.
gemini.modelDescription: Select which Gemini model to use for transcription
gemini.apiKeyRequiredDescription: Enter your Google Gemini API key to use cloud transcription.

debug.title: Diagnostics
debug.description: Collect a support snapshot, open local logs, and access deeper internal tools when needed.
debug.internalDescription: These controls are meant for debugging, calibration, and deeper runtime inspection.
debug.internalLocked: Advanced developer tools stay hidden during normal use. Enable debug mode if you need the full runtime panels.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Capture app state, copy a short summary, or export JSON when something feels off.
overview.empty: Take a snapshot before sending details to support.

support.subject: Vocalype support request
support.bodyIntro: Hello, I need help with Vocalype. Here is my diagnostics summary:
support.bodySteps: What I was doing when the issue happened:
support.bodyAttachment: If needed, I can also attach the exported diagnostics JSON.
support.composeDescription: Large apps usually ask for a short repro, expected behavior, and a diagnostics snapshot. Fill this once and reuse it.
support.issueSummaryPlaceholder: Example: paste fails in Slack after recording ends
support.stepsPlaceholder: List the steps, what app was open, and what Vocalype did.
support.expectedPlaceholder: Example: text should be pasted in the active field without losing clipboard content.
support.checklistDescription: This is the kind of context support teams usually ask for first.

checks.snapshotMissing: Take a fresh snapshot before sending
checks.reproMissing: Add what happened and where it happened
checks.exportHint: If support asks for more detail, export the JSON and attach it to your email.

logDirectory.title: Log Directory
logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored

soundTheme.label: Sound Theme
soundTheme.description: Choose a sound theme for recording start and stop feedback

recordingRetention.title: Auto-Delete Recordings
recordingRetention.description: Automatically delete old recordings to save space

alwaysOnMicrophone.label: Always-On Microphone
alwaysOnMicrophone.description: Keep microphone active for faster response

clamshellMicrophone.title: Clamshell Microphone
clamshellMicrophone.description: Microphone to use when laptop lid is closed

postProcessingToggle.label: Post Processing
postProcessingToggle.description: Enable AI-powered text refinement after transcription

keyboardImplementation.title: Shortcut Backend
keyboardImplementation.description: Choose which keyboard shortcut engine Vocalype should use.
keyboardImplementation.bindingsReset: Some keyboard shortcuts were incompatible and were reset to defaults

paths.title: Useful paths
paths.description: These locations help when you need logs or precise local file paths for support.

pasteDelay.title: Paste Delay
pasteDelay.description: Delay before sending paste keystroke (in milliseconds). Increase if wrong text is being pasted.

snapshot.title: Support snapshot
snapshot.desc: Captures complete app state — config, version, performance, recent events.
snapshot.shareDesc: Includes snapshot, your message and a log fragment. Contains no audio or transcription.

support.title: Prepare your ticket
support.desc: A good ticket = short repro + expected behavior + snapshot. Support has everything in 30 s.
support.formDesc: Be precise about what broke. The shorter, the more useful.

logs.title: Live logs
logs.desc: Recent events — useful when reproducing a bug.
logs.empty: Take a snapshot to see recent events.

runtime.title: Runtime tools
runtime.desc: Calibration, debug and live engine inspection.

cancel.title: Cancel shortcut
cancel.description: Key to cancel the current recording.

micDiag.title: Mic diagnostic
micDiag.description: Quick audio chain test via runtime snapshot.

labs.title: Labs · Voice Feedback
labs.desc: Help us improve the model by reporting specific transcription errors.

voiceFeedback.actualPlaceholder: Meeting at two thirty pm with Alexis
voiceFeedback.notesPlaceholder: Low voice, noisy room, French drift, weird punctuation…

autoPauseMedia.label: Auto-pause media
autoPauseMedia.description: Automatically pauses Spotify and other media players during recording, then resumes when done.

wakeWord.label: Hands-free mode (say "dictate")
wakeWord.description: Say "dictate" to start recording without touching the keyboard. Recording stops automatically when you stop speaking.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: Vocalype needs accessibility permissions to type transcribed text.

actionable.noModelLoaded: No model is loaded. Go to Models and select one.
actionable.microphoneUnavailable: Microphone could not be accessed. Check your system audio settings.
actionable.outOfMemory: Not enough memory. Close other applications and try again.
actionable.audioCaptureFailed: Audio capture failed. Try a different microphone in Settings.

userFacing.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
userFacing.network: Unable to connect. Check your internet connection, then try again.
userFacing.accessRequired: Your access needs to be verified. Sign in again or open your subscription.
userFacing.microphone: Vocalype cannot use the microphone. Check permission and the selected microphone.
userFacing.model: The voice model could not be prepared. Check your connection and try again.
userFacing.agent: The assistant could not respond. Please try again in a moment.

boundary.sectionMessage: An error occurred in this section.

appLanguage.title: Application Language
appLanguage.description: Change the language of the Vocalype interface

appContext.title: Auto context
appContext.description: Adapt dictation to the active app
appContext.enableToggleDescription: Automatically adapt output based on the active app

bootstrap.desktopRuntimeUnavailable: Vocalype failed to connect to the desktop runtime. Please restart the app.
bootstrap.criticalFallback: Vocalype encountered a critical error. Please restart the app.

auth.headline: Create your account and unlock Vocalype instantly.
auth.subheadline: Every account starts with a 14-day free trial without requiring a card. After the trial ends, users can subscribe for $4.99 per month to keep unlimited dictation across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Windows apps.

trial.title: 14-day free trial
trial.description: Create an account and test the full product immediately, with no card required upfront.

subscription.title: Subscription checked
subscription.description: The desktop app verifies account access before unlocking the transcription workflow.

billing.title: Simple billing
billing.description: Manage your subscription through Stripe from inside the app.

auth.trialNote: Your 14-day free trial starts when you create your account. No card is required until the trial ends.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

access.trialDaysLeft: {{count}} days left in your free trial

auth.codeSent: A 6-digit code was sent to your email address.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully. You are now logged in.

errors.networkError: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
errors.emailExistsSwitchedToLogin: An account with this email already exists. Please log in instead.
errors.deviceAlreadyRegistered: An account was already created on this computer. Please log in to your existing account.

auth.sessionExpiredNotice: Session expired — please sign in again to continue.

warnings.whisperGpuUnavailable: GPU not available — running on CPU
warnings.whisperGpuUnavailableDesc: Transcription may be slow. Switch to Parakeet V3 for fast CPU performance.
warnings.pasteFailedCopied: Automatic paste failed — text copied to clipboard
warnings.pasteFailedDesc: {{reason}} — text was copied to your clipboard instead.

welcome.title: 14 days of Vocalype Premium. Free, no card.
welcome.subtitle: Your full access starts now. No card required during the trial.

trial.feature1: Native injection into all your apps

reminder.title: Your trial is expiring soon
reminder.desc: Upgrade to Premium to keep native injection, your shortcuts, and unlimited transcriptions.

dictionary.sectionDescription: Add candidate names, clients, roles, or acronyms for Vocalype to recognize.
dictionary.empty: No names or terms added yet. Add candidates, clients, roles, companies or acronyms.
dictionary.autoLearnDesc: Vocalype can remember corrections you validate.

basic.copiedToClipboardDesc: Native injection is reserved for the Premium plan.
basic.quotaExceededDesc: Upgrade to Premium to dictate without limits.
basic.historyLimited: History limited to {{limit}} entries on Basic
basic.shortcutsLocked: Custom shortcuts are a Premium feature

transcription.warmup_ready: Dictation will be available automatically once the engine is ready.

hints.firstLaunch: Press {{shortcut}} anywhere to start dictating — your text will appear automatically.

tooltips.vad: Voice Activity Detection — automatically detects when you start and stop speaking.
tooltips.postProcessing: Runs AI on your transcription after capture to fix grammar or apply a custom prompt.

meetings.empty:
No meetings yet.
Press + to get started.
meetings.selectOrCreate: Select a meeting or start recording to create one
meetings.transcriptPlaceholder: Transcript will appear here while you speak...
meetings.summaryEmptyState: Click "Generate" to create an AI summary for this meeting.
meetings.noChapters: No chapters yet. Add some transcript first.
meetings.noActions: No actions extracted yet. Click "Extract actions".
meetings.closeTitle: Finish the meeting - the next recording will create a new meeting
meetings.closed: Meeting finished - the next recording will create a new meeting
meetings.importAudioEmpty: No text was extracted from the file
meetings.importAudioError: Unable to import the audio file

notes.empty:
No notes yet.
Click + to create one.
notes.selectOrCreate: Select a note or create a new one
notes.closeTitle: Close note — next dictation will create a new note
notes.closed: Voice note closed — next dictation will create a new note
notes.closeError: Unable to close the active note
notes.importAudioEmpty: No text was extracted from the file

billing.title: Account
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan, usage, and invoices.

manage.title: Manage subscription
manage.description: Update, cancel, or change your subscription.

upgrade.title: Upgrade to Premium
upgrade.description: Unlock unlimited dictation and AI actions.
upgrade.descriptionTrial: Start your paid subscription before the trial ends.

comparison.subtitle: Quick summary before opening the full detail
comparison.cardDescription: Open the full comparison to see the differences across history, AI actions, templates, team features, and support.
comparison.modalSubtitle: Compare exactly what each plan unlocks.

workspace.title: Agency workspace
workspace.subtitle: Seats, members, templates, and admin in one place
workspace.adminBillingDescription: The workspace centralizes seats, shared resources, and the billing contact.
workspace.managedByWorkspace: This account is managed by your agency workspace.
workspace.managedByWorkspaceDescription: Billing and access are managed by the workspace admin.

template.title: Team template
template.name: Template name
template.prompt: Shared prompt for the whole team

invoices.title: Recent invoices
invoices.portalHint: Your invoices are available in the Stripe portal.

upgrade.title: Upgrade to Premium
